title: Don't use Fable 5 in Claude… do this instead
summary: David Ondrej advises against using Fable 5 in Claude and recommends an alternative approach. The video discusses tools and techniques for coding with AI, referencing AutoGit and promoting a coding education community.
writeup: David Ondrej argues against using Fable 5 in Claude and lays out an alternative approach for coding with AI. The video covers tools and techniques for AI-assisted code generation and references AutoGit. It also points to a coding education community.
